seo.title: Aspect Ratio Calculator | Creative Lab

product.title: Aspect Ratio Calculator
product.description: Calculate proportions, equivalent dimensions and scales for images, video, screens and visual compositions.

calculator.presetsDescription: Select a common format to apply it quickly.
calculator.scaleDescription: Enter a new measurement and calculate the proportional dimension.
calculator.tableDescription: Common dimensions that preserve the same ratio.

info.title: How to calculate an aspect ratio
info.description: Enter width and height, review the simplified ratio and calculate new dimensions without distortion.
info.stepTwoText: Get the simplified ratio and orientation.
